batch_summary: In the kitchen, Chandler awkwardly interacts with Eddie, miming putting something in his pocket and tossing a tangelo that bounces off Eddie's chest. Meanwhile, in the bedroom, Monica and Richard discuss their past sexual partners. Monica is relieved that Richard is unfazed by her high number, but she is shocked to learn his number is only two. When Richard explains he has only slept with women he loved, Monica is deeply touched by his romantic nature, realizing she is one of those few.
